name: Japanese Cashew Tamari Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the oil and tamari into a blender.
2. Blend until well mixed.
3. Add the cashews and pulse briefly to chop them coarsely.
4. Serve. If too salty, reduce the amount of tamari.
5. Adjust to individual taste.
6. Tamari is one kind of Japanese Soy Sauce, manufactured using a specific method, making it more expensive than other soy sauces.
